evals.prompt: I need cert info for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-info skill for this certificate info request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects certificate-info for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_info.
Keeps the response focused on retrieving SSL/TLS certificate and connection information from a domain, checking certificate chain details, TLS version, cipher suite, or handshake timing.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused certificate info workflow for example.com; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-info skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects certificate-info instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
